summary: Completed frontend testing of P0 features: Workers module improvements (shift editing, click-to-add-shift on calendar day, mobile UI) and Statistics module improvements (date navigator with history view). All 9 requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Workers page - Műszakbeosztás (Schedule) tab displays monthly calendar with day grid
Workers page - Calendar shows 'Heti' (Weekly) and 'Havi' (Monthly) view toggle
Workers page - Calendar navigation with 'Előző hónap' and 'Következő hónap' buttons
Workers page - Clicking on a calendar day opens new shift dialog
Workers page - New shift dialog has date pre-filled with clicked day (e.g., 2026-03-27T08:00)
Workers page - New shift dialog has worker dropdown, location dropdown, start/end times, lunch break fields
Workers page - Creating shift shows success toast 'Műszak sikeresen létrehozva!'
Workers page - Created shift appears on calendar with worker name and lunch indicator (*)
Workers page - Clicking on existing shift opens edit shift dialog
Workers page - Edit shift dialog title: 'Műszak szerkesztése'
Workers page - Edit shift dialog allows changing worker, location, times, and lunch break
Workers page - Edit shift dialog has 'Mégse' (Cancel) and 'Mentés' (Save) buttons
Workers page - Mobile view shows day cards instead of grid calendar
Workers page - Mobile day cards show day name, date, shift count badge, and shift details
Workers page - Mobile shift details include worker name, times, and lunch break info
Workers page - Mobile view has worker color legend at bottom
Statistics page - Date navigator with prev/next arrows visible
Statistics page - Date picker input shows current date (2026-03-25)
Statistics page - Clicking prev arrow navigates to previous day (2026-03-24)
Statistics page - History view shows cards with orange border (border-orange-500/30)
Statistics page - History view shows: date, cars completed, cash revenue, card revenue, total
Statistics page - 'Ma' (Today) button appears when viewing history
Statistics page - 'Ma' button is hidden when viewing today
Statistics page - Clicking 'Ma' button returns to today's date
Statistics page - Today's view shows 6 stat cards without orange border
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test shift on day 27 for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested P0 features for Workers and Statistics modules. Workers page Schedule tab: 1) Monthly calendar with clickable days to create shifts, 2) Click on existing shift to edit, 3) Mobile view shows day cards with shift details. Statistics page: 1) Date navigator with prev/next arrows and date picker, 2) History view shows orange-bordered cards with date/cars/cash/card/total, 3) 'Ma' button appears when viewing history and returns to today. All features working correctly. Test shift was created on day 27 and deleted after testing.
